data.title: GREEN: Create anti-pattern-scan.md and anti-pattern-fix-batch.md prompt templates
data.description:
Create two prompt templates:

1. plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/anti-pattern-scan.md:
   - Instructions for scan sub-agent to search codebase for confirmed root cause pattern
   - Output Format section with structured candidate list (file paths, evidence, line numbers)
   - Scope exclusion instructions (exclude test files, vendored deps, fixtures, generated code)
   - Experimental confirmation protocol for each candidate

2. plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/anti-pattern-fix-batch.md:
   - TDD instructions: write RED test per candidate, apply fix, confirm GREEN
   - Same-file grouping: handle all instances in assigned file(s) in one pass
   - Batch completion record format with per-candidate status (GREEN/FAILED)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Task c716-3435 tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-prompts.sh
- [ ] Scan prompt file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/anti-pattern-scan.md
- [ ] Fix batch prompt file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/anti-pattern-fix-batch.md
